commands.review_summary:
Adds a compact tool result for internal webchat `message_tool_only` sends and a regression assertion that the tool result omits the visible reply body while delivery metadata remains intact.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main returns a full internal-source payload without a `toolResult`, and the message tool falls back to `jsonResult(result.payload)`, which echoes the visible reply body into the tool result. I did not run the repro because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed; the remaining blocker is contributor or maintainer real-behavior proof plus normal PR validation.

target.title: fix: summarize internal webchat message tool results
target.body:
## Summary

- Keep internal webchat source-reply delivery payloads intact for the UI sink.
- Return a compact `message` tool result for `message_tool_only` internal webchat sends so tool cards do not duplicate and truncate the full visible reply.
- Cover the internal-source path with a regression assertion that the tool result omits the sent message body while preserving delivery metadata.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/outbound/message-action-runner.send-validation.test.ts`
- `pnpm format:check src/infra/outbound/message-action-runner.ts src/infra/outbound/message-action-runner.send-validation.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/infra/outbound/message-action-runner.ts src/infra/outbound/message-action-runner.send-validation.test.ts`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Internal webchat `message_tool_only` sends no longer echo the full visible reply body into the tool result; the actual `sourceReply` payload remains full for delivery.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout in a clean worktree from `origin/main` with dependencies installed via `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/outbound/message-action-runner.send-validation.test.ts`.

Evidence after fix: The regression test asserts `payload.sourceReply.text` is still `hello from codex`, while `result.toolResult` is a compact receipt and `JSON.stringify(result.toolResult)` does not contain `hello from codex`.

Observed result after fix: `Test Files 1 passed (1); Tests 10 passed (10)`.

What was not tested: A live browser/webchat screenshot was not captured; this patch is covered at the outbound message action boundary that creates the duplicated/truncated tool result.
target.author: jason-allen-oneal
